subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajput king is known for his conquests and contribution to Rajasthan's culture?
question_hi: राजस्थान के राज्य के कार्यालय और उसके लिए क्या समर्थन और राज्य की कला के सामान्य है।
explanation_en: Pratap Singh is known for his contributions in the development of Rajasthan and his role in the construction of Mehrangarh Fort in Jaisalmer, Rajasthan.

explanation_en: Ala Singh is the correct answer as he is regarded as the founder of the Merta Clan and established the city of Merta. He is known for his role in the establishment of Merta Fort.
